chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 121 – Arrival of Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (74/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (74/ 6)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) فِي بَيْتٍ دَاخِلٍ فِي جَوْفِ بَيْتٍ لَيْلًا فَرَفَعَ يَدَهُ فَكَانَتْ كَأَنَّ فِي الْبَيْتِ عَشَرَةَ مَصَابِيحَ وَ اسْتَأْذَنَ عَلَيْهِ رَجُلٌ فَخَلَّى يَدَهُ ثُمَّ أَذِنَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhamamd Bin Ali, from Al Hassan Bin Mansour, from his brother who said,

‘I went over to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> in an inside room in the middle of the house one night, so he<sup>asws</sup> raised his<sup>asws</sup> hand, and it was as if there were ten lanterns in the house, and I sought permission for a man to see him<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> freed his<sup>asws</sup> hand, then permitted for him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from those he mentioned from Safwan ibnyh who has said the following. “when abu Ibrahim (a.s.) passed away abu al-Hassan (al-Rida) (a.s.) spoke (about his Imamat) and we became afraid for him because of it. It was said to him, “You have declared a very great issue and we are afraid for you from this rebel.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Let him strive his best but he will find way against me.”
